style_prompt: Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.
image_prompt: An editorial illustration of a lone scout or cartographer on a high ridge, mapping a vast sprawling territory below made of thousands of small buildings and repositories stretching to the horizon, drawing the true map for the first time. Muted Alberta cream palette, navy and rust accents, archival print quality, no text.
composed_prompt:
